notes:
**Joint release Desktop + Managed Server 0.28.0:** Peek at tomorrow's Summary today, plus a managed-server fix so belief synthesis can catch up again.

## Summary fast-forward preview
Wondering what Wednesday's Summary will look like while it's still Tuesday? The toolbar now has a **`< Today >`** control that projects today's tasks onto a future day — schedule-gated sections, relative dates ("due today", overdue), and calendar events all resolve against the day you're previewing. A small Preview pill on the headline makes it clear you're looking ahead (based on tasks as they are now — not a prediction of what you'll defer or unblock). Past days stay clamped at Today; you can't reconstruct yesterday from live state.

## Managed server — synthesizer catch-up
If your managed server was stuck with a growing backlog of unreviewed belief deltas (and ambient analysis kept skipping), this release lifts the timeout on consolidation-mode synthesis so the pipeline can finish and drain. After you update the desktop client, use Settings → **Update your server** when prompted so the matching 0.28.0 backend image rolls.

## Also in this release
Image Verification now shows the Worker's full error message when machine-info fails (instead of a bare HTTP status), which makes stranded "updating" rolls much easier to diagnose.

## Install

| Platform | Artifact |
|---|---|
| Apple Silicon | `Keen_0.28.0_aarch64.dmg` |
| Intel Mac | `Keen_0.28.0_x64.dmg` |

Existing installs: **Keen → Check for Updates** or Settings → Updates. Managed servers update in place via Settings → "Update your server" if prompted.
